description: Get ready to go out and explore your surroundings in comfort and style in these floaters from puma. Team these with cargo shorts and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Synthetic straps over forefoot, front and back of the ankles Adjustable velcro straps for snug Fit Fabric lining for extra comfort Stitch detailing for eye appeal Midsole Soft footbed with in ergonomic design, non-slip grooves and heel counter for all day comfort Outsole TPR outsole with multi-directioanl lugs for superior grip and durability Wash careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDo not machine wash
